iran_nuke.notes: Day 15 21:00 — ELEVATED STABLE. No new nuclear-specific signals. Hegseth claims Iran missile capacity 'down 90%', drones 'down 95%' — if true, increases desperation calculus for nuclear option but no weapons-grade enrichment or test yet. IAEA hidden HEU (460kg of 60%) remains dominant factor. 14 + 12 (hidden HEU) = 26.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 15 21:00 — IMMINENT RISING. NEW: (1) Qatar hit — 4 ballistic missiles + drones, all intercepted. Blast over Doha, temporary evacuations (AJ). Qatar now 4th Gulf state targeted (UAE, Saudi, Kuwait, Qatar). (2) Oman — 2 killed by Iranian drones. First Oman casualties, expanding theater (AJ). (3) Kuwait airport hit by fresh drone attacks (HT). (4) Fujairah fire — bunkering hub blaze after interception debris, oil-loading suspended (AJ/Reuters). (5) Hegseth claims Iran missile capacity 'down 90%', drones 'down 95%' — US assesses Iran weakening but sustained attacks continue. (6) UAE intercepted 9 BMs + 33 drones — 42-projectile barrage, largest on Gulf state territory. Capped at 100.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 15 21:00 — IMMINENT STABLE. NEW: Lebanon reportedly opening negotiation track with Israel (HT). First diplomatic signal from Lebanese side — if formal talks begin, -8 applies. Ground invasion still ongoing, 634+ killed, 800K-1M displaced. Score reduced from 100→92 with negotiation signal. Watch: if negotiations formalize, further de-escalation possible.

turkey.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. No new intercepts since third confirmed March 13. Article 4 consultations remain one-intercept threshold away. Iran now targeting 4 Gulf states — may reduce Turkey corridor focus. 65 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 71.

india.notes: ELEVATED STABLE. No new developments. India remains diplomatically engaged but no military escalation signals. 20 (stable).

russia.notes: CRITICAL STABLE. No major new developments. Russia benefiting from $100+ oil while selling at discount. Kharg Island + Fujairah disruptions further tighten oil market to Russia's benefit. 42 (stable).

china.notes: DETERRENT STABLE. China has not responded to Trump's Hormuz warship request. Warplane flights near Taiwan remain low. China mediating Pakistan-Afghanistan. No new signals. 15 (stable).

north_korea.notes: CRITICAL STABLE. 10+ ballistic missiles confirmed — same event as 19:00 scan. Third provocation this week during US-SK 'Freedom Shield' drills. No new launches. 41 (stable).

russia_ukraine.notes: CRITICAL STABLE. No new Ukraine developments this hour. 430 drones + 68 missiles attack earlier today still dominant signal. Russia expanding drone output to 19,000/day. 56 + 5 (coupling) = 61.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: IMMINENT RISING — DAY 15 22:00. CRITICAL ESCALATION: Afghanistan claims drone strike on 'Hamza' military center in Islamabad (India Today/DW/Hindu). Zardari says Taliban 'crossed a red line' launching drones at civilian targets. Pakistan intercepted 'rudimentary drones' but AF claims hit on Faizabad military complex. Islamabad security tightened — 109 entry points reduced to 25. China mediating (Wang Yi call with Muttaqi). 25 + 60 + 3 (coupling) = 88.

PAKISTAN TIGHTENS ISLAMABAD SECURITY — 109 entry points reduced to 25, heightened military alert (Hindu)

INTENSE STRIKES ON CENTRAL TEHRAN — major US-Israeli strikes hitting Tehran city center (AJ)
IRAN: 'SECURITY UMBRELLA FULL OF HOLES' — urges regional nations to expel US military (AJ)
HAMAS URGES IRAN TO HALT GULF ATTACKS — supports Tehran's right to defend against Israel/US (AJ)
TRUMP: 'MANY COUNTRIES' WILL SEND WARSHIPS TO HORMUZ — naval coalition forming (AJ)
DPRK FIRES 10+ BALLISTIC MISSILES — third provocation this week during US-SK drills (AJ)

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: ESCALATION DETECTED: (1) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN — Afghan drone strike on Islamabad military center. Capital of nuclear-armed state struck. Zardari: 'red line crossed.' Pakistan tightens Islamabad security (109→25 entry points). Score 80→88. (2) IRAN — Intense strikes on central Tehran reported (AJ). Trump threatens Kharg oil sites. Iran allows select Indian ships through Hormuz (rare exception to blockade). Hamas urges Iran to halt Gulf attacks. (3) DPRK — 10+ ballistic missiles fired during US-SK drills, confirmed by AJ and multiple sources (was already at 41, remains stable). GLOBAL: 75% IMMINENT (unchanged). FIVE trackers IMMINENT: Iran conventional (100), Israel-Lebanon (92), Pakistan-Afghanistan (88), Turkey (65/71). THREE CRITICAL: Russia-Ukraine (56/61), Russia (42/50), DPRK (41). WATCH: (a) Pakistan response to Islamabad drone strike — major escalation trigger. (b) China mediating Pak-Afghan — can it contain? (c) Central Tehran strikes — regime command structure targeted? (d) Lebanon negotiations — formal track? (e) Iran 'down 90%' claim — does degradation actually slow attacks? (f) Oman casualties — theater expansion beyond GCC.

latest_news.headline: Afghan drone strikes 'Hamza' military center in Islamabad — Pakistan's capital hit
latest_news.text: Afghan Air Force claims drone strike on 'Hamza' military complex in Faizabad, Islamabad at 5PM local time. Strikes destroyed command centre, depots, residential quarters. Pakistan's President Zardari: Taliban 'crossed a red line.' Islamabad security tightened — entry points reduced from 109 to 25.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan says thwarted Afghan Taliban 'drone attacks' — Zardari: 'red line crossed'
latest_news.text: Pakistan military intercepted 'rudimentary drones' from Afghanistan targeting civilian areas. President Zardari said Taliban 'crossed a red line.' Security heightened in Islamabad. China mediating — Wang Yi urged both sides to avoid escalation in call with Muttaqi.

latest_news.headline: Iran says 'security umbrella full of holes'; urges nations to 'expel' US
latest_news.text: Iran's military spokesperson says US security umbrella in the region is 'full of holes' and urges regional nations to expel US military forces. Intense strikes reported targeting central Tehran.

latest_news.headline: Intense strikes target central Tehran
latest_news.text: Major strikes hitting central Tehran area on Saturday. Trump says 'powerful' bombing raid hit Iranian forces on Kharg island. Iran vows retaliation for US attacks on oil infrastructure.

latest_news.headline: Hamas urges Iran to halt attacks on Gulf, supports Tehran's right to defend against Israel/US
latest_news.text: Palestinian group Hamas calls for end to Iranian attacks on Gulf states while supporting Tehran's right to defend itself against Israel and US aggression.

latest_news.headline: Trump says 'many countries' will send warships to Hormuz amid Iran blockade
latest_news.text: US president urges naval coalition as Iran says Strait of Hormuz closed to 'tankers and ships of enemies.' Two Indian ships allowed through in rare exception.

latest_news.headline: North Korea fires 10+ ballistic missiles during US-South Korea drills
latest_news.text: Seoul's Joint Chiefs confirm approximately 10 ballistic missiles fired by Pyongyang. Third provocation this week during US-SK 'Freedom Shield' exercises.

latest_news.headline: FCC threatens news outlets over critical coverage of Iran war
latest_news.text: FCC chair warns news outlets sharing 'distortions' about US war with Iran could lose their licences. Press freedom concern amid ongoing conflict.

outlook: CRITICAL IMMINENT — Global war probability 75% IMMINENT (Day 15 22:00). MAJOR ESCALATION: (1) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN — Afghan drone strikes military center in Islamabad. Capital of nuclear-armed Pakistan hit. Zardari: 'red line crossed.' Security heightened, entry points slashed 109→25. China mediating. Score 80→88. (2) TEHRAN STRUCK — Intense US-Israeli strikes on central Tehran city center. Iran says 'security umbrella full of holes,' urges nations to expel US. Trump threatens Kharg oil. (3) DPRK — 10+ ballistic missiles fired during US-SK drills, third provocation this week. (4) HORMUZ — Trump says 'many countries' sending warships. Iran allows rare Indian ship passage. (5) HAMAS — urges Iran to halt Gulf attacks while supporting Tehran's defense rights. FIVE trackers IMMINENT: Iran conventional (100), Israel-Lebanon (92), Pakistan-Afghanistan (88), Turkey (65/71). THREE CRITICAL: Russia-Ukraine (56/61), Russia (42/50), DPRK (41). WATCH: (a) Pakistan response to Islamabad drone strike — nuclear state's capital hit, massive escalation trigger. (b) Can China mediation contain Pak-Afghan spiral? (c) Central Tehran strikes — regime command structure targeted? (d) Lebanon negotiations formalizing? (e) Iran 'down 90%' claim — does degradation actually slow attacks despite continued barrages? (f) Hormuz coalition forming — naval confrontation risk rising.
